measurements.claim: The social posting run manifest records that the previously referenced social wave packet paths are absent from the current filesystem state.
evidence: Inventory command found C:\dev\public\telos\docs\outreach exists but only current non-social packet files were present at top level
SOCIAL-POSTING-RUN-MANIFEST-2026-07-02.md lists four missing social wave packet paths under Verified Missing Paths

measurements.claim: The manifest provides an immediate dispatch batch with exact text for 8 public comments across Reddit, YouTube, dev.to, and Hacker News.
evidence: Immediate Dispatch Batch lists R33, R35, R37, R39, Y36, Y42, B23, and B25
Each immediate item includes URL and exact comment text
Destinations cover Reddit, YouTube, dev.to, and Hacker News

measurements.claim: The immediate dispatch batch contains no Project Telos repository link and is framed around technical value rather than link promotion.
evidence: Posting Boundary says do not include a Project Telos repository link in this first repair batch
Immediate Dispatch Batch comments do not contain https://github.com/HarperZ9/telos

measurements.claim: The manifest requires action-time confirmation before public posting and explicitly says not to claim posts until the public side effect completes.
evidence: Posting Boundary says do not claim comments were posted until the public side effect actually completes
Exact Confirmation Prompt asks for confirmation of the exact public-comment batch from the authenticated account
Receipt Template After Posting requires posted-success and moderation state fields

measurements.claim: The manifest keeps quant/trading comments framed as engineering validation rather than investment advice.
evidence: Posting Boundary says quant/trading comments are engineering validation comments, not investment advice
Immediate quant comments discuss backtest receipts, data versions, slippage, split rules, tests, and assumptions
Immediate quant comments do not recommend buying, selling, allocating capital, or expecting a specific return
